category_sources: Official repository README describes Teller as an open-source universal secret manager for developers.
source_facts.description says Teller is a secrets management tool for developers.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the display name Teller.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available official documentation surface found for Teller.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/tellerops/teller, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes using Teller with vaults, key stores, cloud secret services, environment variables, and secret scanning.
